---
name: generate-docs
description: Create or update project documentation aligned with current code behavior.
---

# Generate Docs

Write concise, accurate documentation that reflects real behavior and repository structure.

Ask for audience and target documentation location if not provided.

## Requirements

- Keep documentation synchronized with implemented behavior.
- Use clear structure, short sections, and actionable language.
- Explain intent, constraints, and operational expectations.
- Avoid outdated examples and stale setup instructions.
- Cross-reference relevant repository files when useful.
